rule.name: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for route table changes
rule.description: Real-time monitoring of API calls can be achieved by directing CloudTrail Logs to CloudWatch Logs and establishing corresponding metric filters and alarms.
rule.impact: Non-compliance with CIS Amazon Web Services Foundations 4.13 — Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for route table changes
rule.remediation: Remediate per CIS Amazon Web Services Foundations v1.5.0 section 4.13.

message: [cis_aws/4.13] failed: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for route table changes
